objective: Review and land PR #125, promote dev->main->preview with CI verification. Sol reviews #125, merge into main if approved, sync main into dev, push dev CI green, FF main from dev, FF preview from main, push all. PR #123 stays draft.

workPhases.title: Review PR #125 via sol + merge decision + sync dev

tasks.title: sol reviews PR #125 diff and Antigravity onboarding context
Merge #125 into main if approved, fetch, merge main into dev
Push dev, verify CI green on dev head
FF main from dev, push main
FF preview from main, push preview
Verify CI green on main, all three branches at same head

criteria.scenario: PR #125 reviewed and merged or rejected with evidence
criteria.expectedEvidence: sol review verdict + gh pr view state
criteria.capturedEvidence: sol (Leibniz) reviewed PR #125: plausible but hold — upstream CLIProxyAPI still uses DAILY_API for onboardUser, no test for onboarding hostname, no before/after evidence. Comment posted issuecomment-4966265509 requesting evidence. PR #123 stays draft (previous decision).

criteria.expectedEvidence: gh run success on dev head
criteria.capturedEvidence: dev CI green on 693e8a46: Cross-platform CI completed success (from prior push, verified via gh run list)

criteria.scenario: main and preview promoted to dev head
criteria.expectedEvidence: git log --oneline -1 shows same commit on dev/main/preview
criteria.capturedEvidence: git log --oneline -1 on dev/main/preview all show 693e8a46 — FF promotions confirmed (main de4813da..693e8a46, preview 0ec84e1c..693e8a46)

criteria.expectedEvidence: gh run success on main head
criteria.capturedEvidence: CI on main@693e8a46: Cross-platform CI completed success + Deploy Docs to GitHub Pages completed success
